findings.description: Jan Gallo (born 1893, Šútovo) was the son of Andrej Gallo (also recorded as Ondrej, a variant of the same name).
supporting_sources: Turany Lutheran parish (Turócz County) church records, FamilySearch microfilm 2062258: Jan Gallo's christening record and his parents' marriage record; the groom (Jan's father) is named Andrej, a variant of Ondrej.

findings.description: Jan Gallo had a younger brother, Ondrej Gallo, christened in the same Turany Lutheran parish after Jan's 1893 birth.
supporting_sources: Turany Lutheran parish christening records, FamilySearch microfilm 2062258: christening of a brother Ondrej (and several other younger siblings) to the same parents as Jan Gallo.
